ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., institution, project) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the dataset */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the dataset (e.g., published, unpublished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissue_types" (
  "tissue_ontology_term_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tissue type (ontology term ID) */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue type */,
  "tissue_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the tissue type (e.g., epithelial, connective) */,
  "tissue_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the tissue type (e.g., solid, liquid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_ontology_term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_ontology_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cell type (ontology term ID) */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "cell_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the cell type (e.g., immune, epithelial) */,
  "cell_function" TEXT /* Function of the cell type (e.g., immune response, secretion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_ontology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the donor */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the donor */,
  "development_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the donor */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the donor */,
  "disease_status" TEXT /* Disease status of the donor (e.g., healthy, diseased) */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Treatment status of the donor (e.g., treated, untreated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset detail */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tissue_ontology_term_id" TEXT /* ID of the tissue type */,
  "donor_id" TEXT /* ID of the donor */,
  "cell_type_ontology_id" TEXT /* ID of the cell type */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells of the specified type in the dataset */,
  "cell_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cells of the specified type in the dataset */,
  "cell_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of cells of the specified type in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_details_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_details_cell_type_ontology_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_ontology_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_ontology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_details_tissue_ontology_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_ontology_term_id") REFERENCES tissue_types ("tissue_ontology_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_details_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Lab name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., clustering, differential expression) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the analysis result */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "group_role" TEXT /* Role of the user group (e.g., administrator, collaborator) */,
  "group_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user group (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset share */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the dataset */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group sharing the dataset */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private) */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_shares_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_shares_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset rating */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the dataset */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was rated */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_review" TEXT /* Review of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset comment */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting on the dataset */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
